title: I want Fuyutsuki sensei to read me a bedtime story
display_title: I want Fuyutsuki sensei to read me a bedtime story
wikitext:
[]: I want Fuyutsuki-sensei to read me a bedtime story             Quote Post by Lavinius » Fri Apr 09, 2021 2:56 am Like the Hobbit, or an Atlantean supremacist screed. I could serously listen to Motomu Kiyokawa's voice all day. What would you like him to read to you?

[]: Re: I want Fuyutsuki-sensei to read me a bedtime story             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Fri Apr 09, 2021 12:21 pm The Lord of the Rings (with the appendixes), The Silmarillion and the poetry of Sappho and Artur Alliksaar.

[]: Re: I want Fuyutsuki-sensei to read me a bedtime story             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Apr 09, 2021 2:02 pm I'm not Fuyutsuki, but I'm an older man, and you can hear me read Tolkien (not the well-known stuff) here .

[]: Re: I want Fuyutsuki-sensei to read me a bedtime story             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Sat Apr 10, 2021 2:59 am But I want Fuyutsuki, reeeeee.

[]: Re: I want Fuyutsuki-sensei to read me a bedtime story             Quote Post by Berserker » Sat Apr 10, 2021 5:50 am If you can get Kiyokawa to record a voicebank as in voice sampling of all the alphabets of your preferred language for you or if you've the patience of doing it yourself by recording those notes discretely from all the anime he has acted in, then it's just a matter of time to do some oto-ing and let your computer render your favourite bedtime story in audio format in his voice using vocaloid. Just saying... Also pwhodges, you've quite a beautiful and stable voice even in that age, I must say, far better than my quirky voice.

[]: Re: I want Fuyutsuki-sensei to read me a bedtime story             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Apr 10, 2021 10:05 am I don't care for content as much as for the sound of voice, especially in a language I don't understand; so it could really be anything, as long as it'S, well, long

[]: Re: I want Fuyutsuki-sensei to read me a bedtime story             Quote Post by Lavinius » Sat Apr 10, 2021 6:14 pm Zusuchan wrote: Sappho

[]: Re: I want Fuyutsuki-sensei to read me a bedtime story             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Apr 10, 2021 8:04 pm pwhodges wrote: I'm not Fuyutsuki, but I'm an older man, and you can hear me read Tolkien (not the well-known stuff) here .
